title: clitoria leptostachya var. fruticosa
intro: Clitoria leptostachya var. fruticosa, also known as the tropical pea or butterfly pea, is a perennial plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Clitoria leptostachya var. fruticosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Clitoria leptostachya var. fruticosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used as a natural food colorant and ingredient in traditional remedies.
